summary: INFORMATION TECHNOLOGY MANAGER Summary Successful fifteen years of experience in IT Management and Technical Support. Skilled in installation, configuration, migration and implementation of server platforms. Dedicated IT Manager well-versed in analyzing and mitigating risk and finding cost-effective solutions. Experience in strategic planning, designing and budgeting for new products. Excellent troubleshooting skills in network, servers and software applications.
